chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 536 of 2019 SCRA 537 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2600/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2601/2019. 16.02.2026 These matters are pending since 2019 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. On 11.11.2019, following order was passed: “11.11.2019 Mr. Jawaid Hussain, advocate holding brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant, who is reportedly busy before another bench and requests for adjournment. Adjourned.” On 11.09.2024, following order was passed: “11.09.2024 None present on behalf of Applicant. In the interest of justice, adjourned. Office shall place coy of this order in connected file.” Today situation remains the same and even the applicant has made no effort to get the matter listed for last two years. In view hereof, it appears that the applicant department is not interested in present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
